work_summary.design_system: Applied MONOLITH premium minimalist monochrome theme (index.css, Global styles)
pages_redesigned: Login: New high-end architectural style with Google Auth UI
Home: Cinematic hero section and Bento grid layout
Reservation: Editorial calendar view and time selection
MyReservations: Magazine-style list with confirmed status cards
fixes: Resolved syntax errors in Reservation.tsx (nested ternaries/divs)
Fixed missing lucide-react icons (MeetingRoom -> Building2, ArrowForward -> ArrowRight)
Added autocomplete attributes to input fields to resolve DOM warnings
work_summary.role_verification: Confirmed Admin/User role-based access control (RBAC) via Firestore 'role' field

next_steps: Redesign AdminDashboard.tsx to match MONOLITH theme
End-to-end testing with actual Admin account
Consider adding User Profile management features
